MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2022 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Feb-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's Motion for Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Discover Bank's unopposed summary judgment motion is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
